description_long: This object consists of three old, rusted sedans arranged in a row, each featuring a long hood, a squared-off trunk, and a low, wide stance typical of American cars from the mid-20th century. The exteriors are heavily weathered, with visible patches of rust, faded blue and brown paint, and signs of neglect. The windows are dark and opaque, obscuring any view of the interior, while the body panels show dents and surface corrosion. The headlights and grilles are present but appear dull and partially damaged, and the bumpers are slightly misaligned. The overall form is boxy, with sharp edges and minimal curvature, and the cars sit low to the ground. The wheels are mostly hidden in shadow, but the tires seem deflated or missing, contributing to the abandoned appearance.
description: A group of three rusted, weathered sedans with faded blue-brown paint, boxy shapes, and visible surface corrosion, evoking an abandoned, vintage look.
description_view_0: Three sedans viewed from the front-left, showing rusted hoods, faded paint, and partially visible grilles and headlights.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the squared trunks, dark rear windows, and the overall length of the sedans.
description_view_2: Rear-right perspective with a clear view of the trunk areas, rooflines, and more pronounced rust on the body panels.
description_view_3: Front-right angle showing the boxy front ends, damaged bumpers, and the alignment of the three sedans.
